headline: Is Trade Desk Stock Underperforming the Dow?
summary: While Trade Desk has lagged behind the Dow over the past year, analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

raw.headline: Is Trade Desk Stock Underperforming the Dow?
raw.summary: While Trade Desk has lagged behind the Dow over the past year, analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Wall Street Lunch: Markets Flip After Trump's Iran Pivot
summary: President Donald Trump flipped the market narrative this morning, signaling a quick end to the war in Iran and potential joint control of the Strait of Hormuz.

raw.headline: Wall Street Lunch: Markets Flip After Trump's Iran Pivot
raw.summary: President Donald Trump flipped the market narrative this morning, signaling a quick end to the war in Iran and potential joint control of the Strait of Hormuz.
